vada-pav-with-dry-coconut-garlic-chutney.name: Vada Pav With Dry Coconut-garlic Chutney

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or 2 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Homemade or store-bought cilantro chutney and tamarind chutney

instructions: Toast ½ cup unsweetened shredded coconut in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a food processor and let cool.

Add 4 garlic cloves, unpeeled, smashed, to same skillet and cook, turning occasionally, until golden and fragrant, about 2 minutes. Transfer (skin and all) to food processor along with 2 tsp. Kashmiri chile powder or paprika, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. cayenne pepper. Pulse until mixture is coarsely chopped (small pieces of garlic peel are okay).
Do Ahead: Chutney can be made 2 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

Whisk 1 cup chickpea flour, 2 Tbsp. rice flour, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, ⅛ tsp. cayenne pepper, and ¾ cup water in a medium bowl until smooth. Set batter aside.

Place 2 lb. medium russet potatoes, peeled, in a large pot and pour in water to cover by 2"; season generously with salt. Bring to boil and cook until potatoes are fork-tender, 25–30 minutes. Drain potatoes and return to pot (off heat); let cool slightly. Using a fork, coarsely mash potatoes; set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. vegetable oil in a medium pot over medium-high until shimmering. Cook 10 fresh curry leaves, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, 2 green Thai chiles, thinly sliced, ⅛ tsp. asafetida, and 1 tsp. black mustard seeds, stirring, until mustard seeds begin to pop and curry leaves are fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in remaining ½ tsp. ground turmeric.

Scrape curry-leaf mixture into pot with reserved potatoes; mix until potatoes are evenly stained with turmeric. Mix in ½ bunch cilantro, leaves chopped, 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, and 2½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Taste and add more salt if needed. When mixture is cool enough to handle, form into six 4"-diameter patties; flatten tops.

Pour vegetable oil into a large pot to come 3" up sides; fit with thermometer. Heat oil over medium until thermometer registers 350°. Working in 3 batches, gently dip patties in reserved batter, turning a couple times to coat and letting excess drip back into bowl. Fry, turning halfway through and adjusting heat as needed to maintain oil temperature, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer vadas to paper towels. Between batches, scoop out any stray bits of batter with a slotted spoon and stir into coconut-garlic chutney.

(If desired, use slotted spoon to drop beads of remaining batter into oil; fry until crisp and golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer fried bits—up to about ½ cup—to coconut-garlic chutney; stir to combine. Discard any remaining batter and/or bits.)
Cut a small slit in remaining 10 green Thai chiles (to prevent exploding). Fry chiles until slightly blistered, about 30 seconds. Transfer to paper towels and immediately season with salt.

Spoon a tablespoonful of coconut-garlic chutney onto bottom buns of 6 kaiser rolls, split. Top with vadas and another teaspoonful of coconut-garlic chutney, followed by teaspoonfuls of cilantro chutney and tamarind chutney (if desired). Close sandwiches and serve with fried chiles.

veal-fricando-recipe-comedera.name: Veal Fricandó Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 gr de filetes de ternera cortados delgados
300 gr de setas frescas (si son deshidratadas debes calcular menos cantidad para que al hidratarse lleguen a los 300 gr)
150 ml de vino blanco de cocina
½ cup of fresh parsley leaves

instructions: The first thing to do is to hydrate the mushrooms if they aren't, put them in a bowl with warm water for 20 minutes. If they are natural omits this step and simply cut them into strips.
Rewind beef steaks into wheat flour and cook them into a frying pan with vegetable oil. Be sure that the steaks are slightly golden with both sides. Once ready, put them back.
He pits the onion into fine julians and cook it with soft heat in the same frying pan as the veal.
Add tomato, previously grated and garlic teeth cut into small pieces.
Retract a few minutes to put the meat back into the frying pan.
Inmediatamente agrega el vino blanco y agrega 1 taza de agua.
Add mushrooms, salt and pepper to your taste.
Deja a cocinar a fuego lento durante 45-50 minutos, removiendo de vez en cuando.
You can add more water if you evaporate a lot.
Once ready, remove from the fire and put up with a small chopped parsley.

vegan-crumble-muffins.name: Vegan Crumble Muffins

ingredients.prep: mix 1/2 cup of non-dairy milk, such as almond or soy, and 1/2 tsp of apple cider vinegar and rest for 10 minutes
I used Bob’s Red Mill Egg Replacer but you can use flax eggs or any egg replacer of your preference
or pear, or 1 cup cranberries or blueberries, or fruit of choice

instructions: Preheat your oven to 375° F (190°C) and line a muffin tin with paper liners or grease and flour.
In a bowl whisk oil, buttermilk, and both of the sugar until they are dissolved.
Mix in the eggs and the vanilla extract until they are well incorporated.
Separately, stir together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
Mix the dry ingredients to the wet ones gradually until just combined, don’t over mix.
Fold in the apples or the fruit of your choice.
Divide the batter in the muffin tin, use a ice cream scoop or a ¼ cup measurement.
For the crumble, mix the melted butter with the sugars, then add the flour, oats, and cinnamon. Mix it with a spoon or a fork if you want until crumble pieces form.
Top the muffins with the crumble mixture evenly.
Bake the muffins for 25 minutes or until a toothpick comes clean after inserted in the center of your muffins.
Allow muffins to cool before eating.

vegan-split-pea-soup.name: Vegan Split Pea Soup
instructions: Inspect peas, discarding any stones, foreign matter, or unattractive peas. Place peas in a fine mesh strainer and rinse under cold running water to remove pea dust.

Transfer drained peas into a pot with a lid and a heavy, heat-diffusing bottom. Add water, onion, celery, ketchup, olive oil, salt, garlic, and bay leaves. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to a very slow simmer. Cook, stirring and scraping the bottom every 7 to 12 minutes, until peas have largely fallen apart, about 1 1/2 hours.
Stir carrots into the soup. Cook, covered, stirring often, until peas are completely dissolved and soup is thick, about 1 1/2 hours more. Remove and discard bay leaves. Season with pepper.

vegetable-and-cheese-muffins-with-egg-an.name: Vegetable And Cheese Muffins With Egg ( And Healthy)
vegetable-and-cheese-muffins-with-egg-an.original_name: Muffins de verduras y queso con huevo (fáciles y saludables)

ingredients.item: 1/4 de taza de leche (o una alternativa sin lactosa)
½ cup of fresh, minced spinach
½ cup of red, minced peppers

instructions: Begin by pressurizing your oven at 180 ° C. While hot up, prepare a muffins plate with its grease or using silicone mold.

It pics spinach, peppers, mushrooms and onion into small and uniform pieces. You can use your choice of vegetables or even add some as broccoli, cherry tomatoes or pumpkins as your preferences. You can also use ham and york in pits
In a big bowl, beat your balls. Add milk and mix well. You can use regular milk or an lactose-free alternative, such as almond milk or soya milk, as required by your diet.
Add minced vegetables to egg mix. Also add the grated cheese and ham in pits, if you prefer, to give an additional taste. Meg everything together.
Add the condiments of your choice, as dusted garlic, oregano and pimenton, to give a taste to your egg muffins with vegetables. Add salt and pepper to your taste.
Fold the mixture into muffins mold and fill them up to about 3 / 4 parts as muffins will increase a little while while cooking.

Put the plate in the pre-heated oven and purple for about 20-25 minutes, or until the muffins are golden and have been up. You can check the cooking by inserting a stick into the centre of a muffin and if it's clear, they're ready.
Once egg muffins with vegetables are cooked, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before they are broken. Fold them hot.

vegetable-pie-lezzet.name: Vegetable Pie
instructions: 1. Sauce vegetables in olive oil for inner material.
2. sprinkle salt, pepper and red pepper.
3. Leave to cool.
4. The necessary materials for dough outside butter and olive oil are mixed in a container and knead 10 minutes.
5. Leave it to leave 1 hour by covering the top.
6. Take the dough into two equal parts and finely open one on the ground.
7. Melt the butter and mix it with olive oil and over the dough.
8. Close in the form of the envelope and wait on the edge.
9. Prepare other parts in the same way.
10. Place the oven tray into the first dough tray you prepared.
11. 11. Published vegetable mortar on it.
12. Close on the other dough.
12. August Bake the egg yolk and bake until the oven was fried in 190 degrees.
14 July Serve your service.

vegetable-soup-with-sriracha-lemongrass-.name: Vegetable Soup With Sriracha, Lemongrass, And Tofu

ingredients.prep: cut from bottom of stalk and smashed with back of knife

instructions: Heat oil in heavy large pot over medium-low heat. Add onions and garlic; sprinkle with salt. Sauté until tender, stirring often, about 15 minutes. Add broth, lemongrass, and sriracha. Increase heat: cover and bring to boil. Remove from heat; let stand 15 minutes. Uncover; discard lemongrass.

Add spinach, tofu, lime juice, and cilantro to broth. Place over medium heat and cook until spinach wilts and soup and tofu are heated through, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes. Season to taste with salt.

vegetarian-leek-patties.name: Vegetarian Leek Patties

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Halve leek lengthwise; rinse under running water. Separate leek layers to remove any sand. Cut each half down the center; thinly slice.

Place leeks in a pot; add enough water so leeks float but are not covered. Cover pot; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer; cook until tender, 25 to 30 minutes. Drain excess water; return leeks to the pot. Heat to a simmer; simmer until all excess liquid has evaporated, stirring occasionally, 4 to 5 minutes.
Transfer leeks to a bowl; add bread crumbs, egg, salt, and black pepper. Divide into 4 equal portions; form each into a 3-inch patty using wet hands.
Heat enough oil in a nonstick skillet to just cover the bottom on medium-high heat until it shimmers.
Cook patties, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain; serve warm.

vegetarian-southwestern-potato-skins.name: Vegetarian Southwestern Potato Skins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Prick potatoes a few times with a fork. Rub potatoes with 1 teaspoon oil and set directly on the oven rack. Bake for 1 hour. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool until easily handled. Keep the oven on.

Cut the potatoes lengthwise and scoop out flesh to within 1/4 inch of skin. Brush remaining oil over the skins and sprinkle with salt. Place them on a baking sheet skin-side down and bake for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine black beans, corn, picante sauce, jalapeno, onion, lime juice, and cumin in a bowl. Stir until evenly combined.
Divide filling between the potatoes and top with Cheddar cheese. Bake until cheese has melted, about 5 minutes.

vermouth-time-what-it-is-and-how-to-prep.name: Vermouth Time (what It Is And How To Prepare A Vermouth For An Aperitif)
vermouth-time-what-it-is-and-how-to-prep.original_name: La hora del Vermut (qué es y cómo preparar un vermú para el aperitivo)

ingredients.item: Red vermut (we recommend this or this)

instructions: Para preparar tu vermut para el aperitivo utiliza un vaso bajo. Coloca dentro dos hielos y una rodaja de naranja. Pincha en un palillo dos aceitunas verdes sin hueso
Add the cold and cold red vermut at about 8-10ºC.
It's accompanied by olives and some French fries.
